goal: Record EF Core async command timings so load-test DB command p95/p99 metrics are available for async public read paths.
changed: Added ReaderExecutedAsync, ScalarExecutedAsync, NonQueryExecutedAsync, and CommandFailedAsync overrides to LoadTestDbCommandDiagnosticsInterceptor.
Added Postgres integration coverage proving async EF commands increment diagnostics command latency samples.
Fixed standalone k6 maxVUs assignment in public-api-rps.js and public-api-spike.js.
intentionallyNotChanged: No public DTO shape or content model change in this slice.
No DB roundtrip or Npgsql pool reduction in this slice.

validations.evidence: Failed before async overrides because CommandLatency.SampleCount did not increment; passed after implementation.
Component 121/121, Unit 56/56, Architecture 35/35, Integration 205/205, Contract skipped due no pact files.
1,501 requests, 100.05 rps, failure rate 0, p95 4.16 ms.
Returned 401; test-login returned 404, so endpoint readback was not verified locally.

risks: End-to-end UI diagnostics readback still needs an authenticated deployed Real Backend Test run.
This slice improves observability, not DB/query/serialization capacity directly.
The local k6 smoke is not a 1000 rps proof.
recommendation: Merge this instrumentation first, then continue with stored representative image metadata and detail-query roundtrip reduction.
